features: NATURAL COTTON: Cotton Tree is hypoallergenic, made from 100 Percentpure natural cotton, perfect for daily use. Large roll perfect for a busy household, leave rolls in bathrooms amd bedrooms
COSMETIC ESSENTIAL: Apply cleansing lotions, skin and eye make up cleansers, oils and powders. Remove make-up and nail polishes.
NATURAL COTTON: Hypoallergenic, made from 100 Percentpure natural cotton, perfect for daily use

GENTLE CLEANSING: Always use a cleanser made to remove makeup, apply as directed. Take care around the eye, the skin is thinner, do not pull or rub. Apply and leave as cleanser directs to help dissolve makeup,making it easier and gentler on the skin to remove. Rubbing at the skin can irritate.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Convenient roll of soft cotton wool
description: Product Description Cotton Tree is hypoallergenic, made from 100 Percentpure natural cotton, perfect for daily use. Large roll perfect for a busy household, leave rolls in bathrooms and bedrooms. Apply cleansing lotions, skin and eye make up cleansers, oils and powders. Remove make-up and nail polishes. Always use a cleanser made to remove makeup, apply as directed. Take care around the eye, the skin is thinner, do not pull or rub. Apply and leave as cleanser directsto help dissolve makeup,making it esier and gentler to the skin to remove. Rubbing at the skin can irritate. Convenient roll of soft cotton wool Directions Apply cleansing lotions, skin and eye make-up cleansers, oils and powders. Remove make-up and nail polishes. Always use a cleanser made to remove makeup, apply as directed. Take care around the eye, the skin is thinner, do not pull or rub. Apply and leave as cleanser directs to help dissolve makeup, making it easier and gentler on the skin to remove. Rubbing at the skin can irritate. Dispose of used cotton pads responsibly. Safety Warning Always use a cleanser made to remove makeup, apply as directed. Take care around the eye, the skin is thinner, do not pull or rub. Apply and leave as cleanser directs to help dissolve makeup, making it easier and gentler on the skin to remove. Rubbing at the skin can irritate. See more
